title: Textile Bleaching and Dyeing Machine Operators and Tenders
description: Operate or tend machines to bleach, shrink, wash, dye, or finish textiles or synthetic or glass fibers.

tasks.text: Weigh ingredients, such as dye, to be mixed together for use in textile processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start and control machines and equipment to wash, bleach, dye, or otherwise process and finish fabric, yarn, thread, or other textile goods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe display screens, control panels, equipment, and cloth entering or exiting processes to determine if equipment is operating correctly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify supervisors or mechanics of equipment malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor factors such as temperatures and dye flow rates to ensure that they are within specified ranges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Add dyes, water, detergents, or chemicals to tanks to dilute or strengthen solutions, according to established formulas and solution test results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine and feel products to identify defects and variations from coloring and other processing standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust equipment controls to maintain specified heat, tension, and speed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Soak specified textile products for designated times.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect machinery to determine necessary adjustments and repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with coworkers to get information about order details, processing plans, or problems that occur.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sew ends of cloth together, by hand or using machines, to form endless lengths of cloth to facilitate processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Ravel seams that connect cloth ends when processing is completed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove dyed articles from tanks and machines for drying and further processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study guides, charts, and specification sheets, and confer with supervisors to determine machine setup requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare dyeing machines for production runs, and conduct test runs of machines to ensure their proper operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Key in processing instructions to program electronic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test solutions used to process textile goods to detect variations from standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record production information such as fabric yardage processed, temperature readings, fabric tensions, and machine speeds.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Thread ends of cloth or twine through specified sections of equipment prior to processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mount rolls of cloth on machines, using hoists, or place textile goods in machines or pieces of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, level, and align components such as gears, chains, dies, cutters, and needles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform machine maintenance, such as cleaning and oiling equipment, and repair or replace worn or defective parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
